Description.SourceString:
We are all slaves to the beast within the belly. Its gurgling roar urges us ever onward to consume, consume, consume. At least that’s the excuse I use when people ask about my ever-expanding midriff.

Still, we need food to survive, even the most restrictive (sane) diet plans acknowledge that. Ashenfall has a wealth of options, some delicious and others… well… less so. Food will increase your Sustenance meter, which makes you healthier and heartier. Some food will also provide special benefits, such as resistances to poison.

The higher quality the food, the longer its effects last, so make sure you’re always making the best meals you can.
